subcodes.first_line: O Rahim! Know thou that My Pen hath found no rest or tranquility at any time; its cry hath been raised aloft [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رحیم فاعلم بان قلمی لم یر الراحه و السکون فی کل الاحیان ارتفع صریره و دعا
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the power of words; of speech
